arts.ttl: Preview: Holstein Kiel vs. Eintracht Frankfurt - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between Holstein Kiel and Eintracht Frankfurt, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Weekend acca predictions: Five teams to back across Europe on Sunday
arts.sum: It’s another typically busy Sunday of action across some of Europe’s top leagues and William Maxwell has put together our five-team accumulator.
